game_info.title: Kero Blaster: Reboot
game_info.concept:
C&F Inc. teleporters are going offline all over the place, and it's up to an intrepid frog employee to fix the situation. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/292500/Kero_Blaster/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ C&F Inc. teleporters are going offline all over the place, and it's up to an intrepid frog employee to fix the situation.

Studio Pixel is proud to present Kero Blaster - the latest title from the creator of Cave Story.
The C&F Inc. teleporters are going offline all over the place, and it's up to an intrepid frog employee to fix the situation.
A classic-style, 2D side-scrolling action game packed with adventure.

You are a bipedal frog and master of the Custodial Sciences, charged with the unenviable task of ridding your company's teleporters of the strange black creatures plaguing them.
Pick up all kinds of exciting new tools of the trade while fighting for your life through a menagerie of unique monsters.

2017/3/21
Multilanguage support!

There are also two more games on Steam featuring the cast of Kero Blaster, available for free!
PINK HOUR and its sequel, PINK HEAVEN.

Use them to test out your system for Kero Blaster, or simply enjoy a couple of free games!
game_info.description: You are Kero, a custodial engineer at C&F Inc. The teleporter network is down due to an infestation of "glitch bugs". Use your trusty blaster to clear the way through the server rooms, jump over cooling vents, and reach the main terminal to reboot the system. Switch weapons to adapt to different threats and don't let the bugs touch you!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left/Right: Move
- Arrow Up: Look Up / Aim Up
- Arrow Down: Crouch
- Space: Jump
- Z: Shoot
- Shift: Switch Weapon
- ESC: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart (from Game Over screen)
- ENTER: Start Game

TEST_1.test_description: Validate basic player movement, gravity, and shooting mechanics in a live environment.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Simulate holding the Right Arrow key to move forward and the Z key to fire the weapon. The test will periodically press Space to simulate jumping over potential obstacles based on a simple timer.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player character should successfully move to the right from the spawn point and fire projectiles. The game should remain in the PLAYING phase without crashing.

TEST_1.expected: The player character should successfully move to the right from the spawn point and fire projectiles. The game should remain in the PLAYING phase without crashing.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify the victory condition and end-of-level transition logic.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Inject a 'God Mode' state where the player ignores collision damage and moves at super speed directly towards the level end goal (the Teleporter).
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should reach the Teleporter object rapidly, triggering the interaction logic and shifting the gamePhase to "GAME_OVER_WIN".
